      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (

                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1

      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

[14:44:47 INF] [] info: 4/1/2026 14:44:47.007 RelationalEventId.CommandExecuted[20101] (Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command) 
      Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (

                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

[14:44:47 INF] [] info: 4/1/2026 14:44:47.121 RelationalEventId.CommandExecuted[20101] (Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command) 
      Executed DbCommand (57ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (289ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`

                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c

                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (26ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

[14:47:48 INF] [] info: 4/1/2026 14:47:48.023 RelationalEventId.CommandExecuted[20101] (Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command) 
      Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

[14:47:58 INF] [] info: 4/1/2026 14:47:58.785 RelationalEventId.CommandExecuted[20101] (Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command) 
      Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (61ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (272ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      Executed DbCommand (393ms) [Parameters=[p0='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a', p1='08de7923-12ef-423d-8851-50623ed48d9a'], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
      SELECT `d`.`Id`, `d`.`CreatedAt`, `d`.`ParentCommentId`, `d`.`PostId`, `d`.`Text`, `d`.`UserId`, `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FName`, `u`.`LName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`PhoneNumber`, `u`.`RefreshToken`, `u`.`RefreshTokenExpiryTime`, `u`.`Role`
      FROM (
      
                      WITH RECURSIVE CommentTree AS (
                      SELECT * FROM comments 
                      WHERE PostId = @p0 AND ParentCommentId IS NULL
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT c.* FROM comments c 
                      INNER JOIN CommentTree ct ON c.ParentCommentId = ct.Id
                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
                      )
                      SELECT * FROM CommentTree
      ) AS `d`
      INNER JOIN `users` AS `u` ON `d`.`UserId` = `u`.`UserId`

      FROM (

                      WHERE c.PostId = @p1
